headline: Inference engineer at AI21 working on production LLM serving, vLLM, and Jamba/Mamba reliability
title: Senior Software Engineer / Inference Engineer
confidenceNote: Multiple primary and high-signal sources confirm AI21 inference role, vLLM work, and recent AI Engineer World's Fair speaking context.
bioMarkdown: Senior software engineer on AI21's inference team, focused on high-performance LLM serving and reliability for systems such as vLLM, Jamba, and Mamba. Good match for conversations about production inference, GPU efficiency, model-serving bugs, and infrastructure for hybrid architectures.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Asaf Gardin as Senior Software Engineer, Inference Team at AI21 Labs, focused on high-performance LLM inference and infrastructure.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Shows AI21 Labs affiliation and public work around AI21 repositories and vLLM.

primary.label: AI21 blog
primary.note: AI21 engineering post about debugging vLLM scheduler and Mamba state corruption.

primary.label: AI21 event page
primary.note: Lists Asaf as an AI21 senior software engineer speaking on vLLM debugging at AI Engineer World's Fair 2026.

secondary.note: Lists Asaf Gardin as Senior Software Engineer, Inference Team at AI21 Labs, presenting on efficient LLM serving with vLLM.

secondary.note: Describes his specialization in large-scale LLM inference, performance optimization, production deployment, Jamba, and Mamba.

secondary.label: AI Engineer World's Fair schedule
secondary.note: Public schedule lists Asaf Gardin at AI21 as Senior Software Engineer / Inference Engineer.

headline: Founder and CEO of GoCloud iQ, focused on cloud modernization, cyber resilience, and AI-ready infrastructure
title: Founder / CEO
confidenceNote: Company, hiring, and startup-profile sources consistently connect Ashish Mahure with GoCloud iQ leadership in Houston.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of GoCloud iQ, a Houston-based cloud and cyber resilience consultancy. Useful connection for enterprise cloud modernization, VMware exits, hybrid and multi-cloud strategy, security, compliance, and AI infrastructure adoption.

primary.note: Company site describes GoCloudIQ's cloud strategy, managed cloud, security, compliance, migration, and enablement services.

primary.note: Describes GoCloudIQ as helping organizations modernize infrastructure, strengthen cybersecurity, and build intelligent cloud environments for the AI era.

headline: Enterprise technology and solution architecture leader in Selective Insurance's Enterprise COE
title: AVP, Enterprise COE Services
confidenceNote: Role and location are supported by LinkedIn snippets and participant-provided data, but there is limited public corroboration beyond LinkedIn and company context.
bioMarkdown: AVP for Enterprise COE Services at Selective Insurance, with public profile evidence pointing to nearly two decades in enterprise technology and solution architecture. Likely strong match for enterprise AI adoption, insurance technology modernization, architecture governance, and center-of-excellence operating models.

headline: Cofounder of Morphiq Labs, building agent-experience and answer-engine optimization tooling
title: Cofounder
confidenceNote: LinkedIn profile/post evidence, company page, and Morphiq web/docs context align with the participant-provided name, company, and role.
bioMarkdown: Cofounder at Morphiq Labs, working on how AI agents and answer engines discover, evaluate, and rank products. Relevant for conversations about agent-facing growth, AI visibility, developer-tool distribution, AEO, and benchmarks for coding-agent behavior.
